message:
🌱 Add argo-workflows: getting `empty git-upload-pack given` from wf using git mission (#887)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,77 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "argo-workflows-9613-getting-empty-git-upload-pack-given-from-wf-using-git-artifa",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "argo-workflows: getting `empty git-upload-pack given` from wf using git artifacts as input",
+    "description": "getting `empty git-upload-pack given` from wf using git artifacts as input. Requested by 27+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current argo-workflows deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your argo-workflows version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n argo-workflows -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-workflows\nhelm list -n argo-workflows 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working argo-workflows installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review argo-workflows configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant argo-workflows configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n argo-workflows -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-workflows\nkubectl get configmap -n argo-workflows -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=argo-workflows\n```\nWorkflows using git artifacts as input fail with `empty git-upload-pack given` error. The pipeline stays stuck at the init stage while trying to clone the git repository."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for getting `empty git-upload-pack given` from wf using git\u2026",
+        "description": "This bug was caused after the commit https://github.com/go-git/go-git/commit/320db9af8ba8b0046e833013504eb07c61a3573c on the [go-git](https://github.com/go-git/go-git) upstream. This commit was supposed to allow us to fetch a new depth on a shallow clone (more details here\n```yaml\nartifacts:\n          - name: argo-source\n            path: /workspace\n            git:\n              repo: https://myuser@bitbucket.org/mycompany/myrepo.git\n              revision: c480097dfb84f12e897de3b1037dcecb7c86bc0e\n              depth: 1\n              usernameSecret:\n                name: bitbucketserver-access\n                key: username\n              passwordSecret:\n                name: bitbucketserver-access\n                key: secret\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n argo-workflows -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-workflows\nkubectl get events -n argo-workflows --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"getting `empty git-upload-pack given` from wf using git\u2026\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "The bug was caused by an upstream go-git commit that broke shallow clone fetching. Fix by upgrading the go-git dependency or pinning to a version before the breaking change.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "artifacts:\n          - name: argo-source\n            path: /workspace\n            git:\n              repo: https://myuser@bitbucket.org/mycompany/myrepo.git\n              revision: c480097dfb84f12e897de3b1037dcecb7c86bc0e\n              depth: 1\n              usernameSecret:\n                name: bitbucketserver-access\n                key: username\n              passwordSecret:\n                name: bitbucketserver-access\n                key: secret",
+        "time=\"2022-10-11T07:15:56.753Z\" level=info msg=\"Loading script source to /argo/staging/script\"\ntime=\"2022-10-11T07:15:56.753Z\" level=info msg=\"Start loading input artifacts...\"\ntime=\"2022-10-11T07:15:56.753Z\" level=info msg=\"Downloading artifact: repository\"\ntime=\"2022-10-11T07:16:01.129Z\" level=info msg=\"Load artifact\" artifactName=repository duration=4.376108367s error=\"failed to fetch [refs/heads/*:refs/heads/*]: empty git-upload-pack given\" key=\ntime=\"2022-10-11T07:16:01.129Z\" level=error msg=\"executor error: artifact repository failed to load: failed to fetch [refs/heads/*:refs/heads/*]: empty git-upload-pack given\"\ntime=\"2022-10-11T07:16:01.130Z\" level=info msg=\"Alloc=11588 TotalAlloc=51494 Sys=37842 NumGC=10 Goroutines=2\"\ntime=\"2022-10-11T07:16:01.130Z\" level=fatal msg=\"artifact rep",
+        "init time=\"2022-09-29T15:34:39.349Z\" level=info msg=\"Loading script source to /argo/staging/script\"                                                                                                                \ninit time=\"2022-09-29T15:34:39.349Z\" level=info msg=\"Start loading input artifacts...\"                                                                                                                             \ninit time=\"2022-09-29T15:34:39.349Z\" level=info msg=\"Downloading artifact: argo-source\"                                                                                                                            \ninit time=\"2022-09-29T15:34:39.758Z\" level=info msg=\"Load artifact\" artifactName=argo-source duration=409.361623ms error=\"failed to fetch [refs/heads/*:refs/heads/*"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "argo-workflows",
+      "graduated",
+      "app-definition",
+      "troubleshoot"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [

+    ],

+      "repo": "https://github.com/argoproj/argo-workflows"
+    },
+    "reactions": 27,
+    "comments": 20,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },

+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl",
+      "argo"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with argo-workflows installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-13T06:19:15.356Z",
